Oil math: How UAE's exit from OPEC will impact world’s energy market
description: The United Arab Emirates' exit from OPEC has significantly impacted the group's global crude oil output, reducing its share from 35% to 31%. This move, effective May 1, 2026, highlights the UAE's substantial role in the bloc. Meanwhile, regional disruptions due to the Strait of Hormuz closure are escalating, with Iraq, Saudi Arabia, and Kuwait facing major production shut-ins.

title: 'You need to apologise': Ben Stokes breaks silence on nightclub controversy
description: England captain Ben Stokes said he apologised to teammates after he and Gus Atkinson missed the second Test for breaching the team's midnight curfew. Stokes admitted the nightclub controversy overshadowed the debuts of several young players and affected the squad. Cleared of serious misconduct but issued warnings, Stokes stressed accountability, denied any rift with coach Brendon McCullum, and said the team is now fully focused on winning the series decider against New Zealand.

This tragedy follows the loss of his mother just eight months earlier. Arvind's legacy and cameo in the beloved sitcom profoundly influenced Tanmay's artistic journey, leaving fans and colleagues heartbroken by the news.

The report highlights over 250 child fatalities since October and a systematic pattern of strikes on healthcare facilities. Israel has vehemently rejected these findings, calling the report a "propaganda piece" and a "political blood libel."

The ECB and BCCI are coordinating arrangements, while his parents are expected to accompany him throughout the tour.

He observed Ketan arriving with Siya Goyal, followed by Chetan Chaudhary, who appeared to deliberately conceal his identity. Police allege Siya and Chetan, her lover and co-conspirator, then pushed Ketan into a gorge, with Siya later fabricating a story of an accidental fall. The couple is now in custody.

The incident occurred Tuesday night between Andheri and Borivali after an argument with passenger Mayank Lohar over closing a coach door during heavy rain. Lohar sustained a fatal abdominal wound and later died at Shatabdi Hospital. Police identified Suvarna through extensive CCTV analysis.

Bobrovsky, set to become an unrestricted free agent after his contract with the Florida Panthers expires, gives Toronto a financially efficient route to upgrade in net without surrendering trade assets. Two existing Maple Leafs, Anthony Stolarz and Steve Lorentz, both share strong personal bonds with Bobrovsky from his time in Florida, adding an unusual layer of familiarity to an already compelling fit.

description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored twice as Portugal beat Uzbekistan 5-0 to secure their first win of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The 41-year-old became the first player to score in six different World Cups and Portugal’s all-time leading World Cup scorer with 10 goals. Ronaldo also matched Lionel Messi and Michael Laudrup as both his country's youngest and oldest World Cup scorer.

title: Kolkata warehouse collapse: 3 dead, many still trapped; top developments
description: A frantic rescue operation is underway in West Kolkata after an under-construction warehouse collapsed, trapping over 20 workers. Cranes, bulldozers, and specialized teams are working tirelessly to free those buried under the debris. Eleven injured have been rescued and hospitalized. Authorities are deploying advanced equipment, including sniffer dogs and drones, to locate survivors amidst the wreckage.

title: Sooryavanshi mania triggers ticket rush in Ireland ahead of possible India debut
description: Excitement is building in Ireland for 15-year-old prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's potential India debut in the upcoming T20I series. His IPL exploits have generated significant buzz, with fans from across Europe eager to witness the event. Former cricketer MV Narasimha Rao believes Sooryavanshi's style resembles Gary Sobers and advises the young talent to stay grounded amidst the growing hype.

description: India and the US concluded ministerial talks on a proposed trade deal, aiming for an interim pact before a US tariff deadline next month. Discussions focused on market access, digital trade, and reducing barriers. This follows recent high-level meetings and aims to deepen economic ties, with both nations reviewing progress on key trade elements and potential tariff adjustments.

description: According to Lavrov, Putin agreed to proposals put forward by the United States during the Alaska meeting and reached an understanding with Trump on how the fighting in Ukraine could be brought to an end and how broader discussions could proceed afterwards. Lavrov said Russia remained committed to those agreements and would not support alternative interim arrangements or bend to ultimatums.

title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status: Here's why his net worth fell
description: Elon Musk, once the world's first trillionaire, has seen his net worth dip below the 13-figure mark to $957 billion. A significant sell-off in Tesla and SpaceX shares, following SpaceX's IPO surge, has led to this decline. Concerns over an AI market bubble and potential interest rate hikes are contributing to the downturn in tech stocks.

description: Indian Navy warships INS Udaygiri and INS Kavaratti have arrived in Vietnam, marking a significant step in deepening defense ties. This deployment highlights India's growing naval presence and its commitment to maritime security in Southeast Asia. The visit underscores the strong strategic partnership between India and Vietnam, emphasizing shared concerns for a stable, rules-based maritime order in the Indo-Pacific.

Investigations into incidents like the Lohagad Fort murder and the Meghalaya honeymoon killing point towards secret relationships and conspiracies. Victims were reportedly targeted by those they knew and trusted, raising questions about the darker side of personal disputes.

Will Mumbai schools and colleges remain closed tomorrow amid IMD orange alert?
description: Mumbai grappled with heavy rainfall and severe waterlogging on June 23, causing significant traffic disruptions. The IMD has issued an orange alert for the city, warning of intense showers and thunderstorms. Despite the adverse weather, no official announcement has been made regarding school or college closures for tomorrow. Educational institutions are expected to operate normally unless further directives are issued by the administration.

title: Builder kept homebuyer's money for 10 years, court orders to refund Rs 5.25 lakh
description: A Hoshiarpur consumer commission has ordered a builder and housing society to refund Rs 5.25 lakh to a software engineer. The project, "Krisha Heights," promised completion within four years of a 2015 application, but remained on paper for over a decade. The commission slammed the delay as an unfair trade practice, stating builders cannot collect funds without approvals and use them as interest-free capital. The refund includes 7% annual interest.

Matt Henry joins Jasprit Bumrah, becomes first Kiwi in 36 years to ...
description: Matt Henry has achieved a historic feat, joining Jasprit Bumrah at the pinnacle of the ICC Test bowling rankings. Both pacers now share the World No. 1 spot with 870 rating points. Henry's remarkable 11-wicket haul at The Oval propelled him to this elite status, ending a 36-year wait for a New Zealand seamer to reach the top.

title: Guwahati businessman holds wife’s birthday party on new flyover, arrested
China’s new ‘sin list’: Why Xi's anti-graft crusade is now policing golf, feng shui & luck
description: China's decade-long anti-corruption drive under Xi Jinping has transformed from tackling graft to enforcing political loyalty and ideological conformity. Party watchdogs now scrutinize officials' beliefs, associations, and leisure activities, extending beyond traditional bribery to include "political discipline" and "elegant corruption." This broadens the campaign's scope to ensure strict adherence to Beijing's directives and Xi's policy priorities across the Communist Party apparatus.

title: Portugal's FIFA World Cup R32 qualification scenario explained
description: Colombia booked their place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 after defeating DR Congo 1-0 in their Group K clash on Wednesday. The South American side made it two wins from two matches after previously beating Uzbekistan 3-1. With six points from their opening two games, Colombia have secured qualification for the knockout stage with one group match still to play.

R Madhavan flaunts Rs 40 lakh limited-edition rose gold watch at Padma Shri ceremony
description: Actor R Madhavan received the prestigious Padma Shri from President Droupadi Murmu, a moment shared with his family. His exquisite 18-karat rose gold Jalsa Nebula watch, featuring a miniature painting inspired by Jaipur's Hawa Mahal and valued at Rs 40 lakhs, stole the spotlight. Madhavan expressed profound gratitude for the honour, dedicating it to his supporters and the world of cinema.

description: In a remarkable turn of events, Shubman Gill now ranks second in the ICC ODI batting rankings, overtaking fellow Indian star Virat Kohli, who drops to third. Gill showcased his exceptional skills versus Afghanistan, scoring a century and claiming Player of the Series honors. Rohit Sharma follows closely at fourth place. Police claim the couple conspired to push Ketan from Lohagad Fort, staging it as an accident.  Ketan's parents, who had known Goyal's family for decades and trusted her implicitly, expressed shock and devastation at the betrayal, questioning why their son had to die if the marriage was unwanted.

description: Homebuyers facing builder delays now have a powerful recourse through RERA. This law mandates project registration, transparency, and timely possession. If your builder misses deadlines, RERA offers options: claim monthly interest for the delay or opt for a full refund with interest. Gather your documents and file a complaint online or offline to protect your investment and secure your dream home.

While Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce focus on their wedding, it seems the pop star has gone through a wave of emotions.

title: Identify, repair, recast: 44 flyovers over 15 years old to undergo structural audit
description: Delhi's Public Works Department is launching structural audits for 44 flyovers older than 15 years, with some dating back three decades. This proactive measure, costing Rs 11 crore, aims to identify and address potential safety risks before they become critical. The initiative underscores a commitment to preventive maintenance and ensuring the long-term safety and reliability of the city's vital infrastructure for its citizens.

title: After laying off hundreds of engineers, GM swaps 1,000 workers with 50 robots
description: General Motors has introduced 50 collaborative robots at its Michigan Factory Zero, reportedly leading to over 1,000 job eliminations. This move, aimed at cost-cutting and efficiency, sparks criticism from the United Auto Workers union, which views it as a threat to jobs. GM claims the robots support human workers, but the UAW president calls it a "fight for humanity" amid broader automation concerns in the industry.
